metadata.title: Kasy | Ship your Flutter app in 7 days
metadata.description: The complete Flutter kit for people with an idea, not months of setup. Backend, auth, payments, UI, and CLI ready. iOS, Android, and Web on day one.

tagline.lead: The Flutter kit to ship on iOS,
tagline.tail: Android, and Web without building everything from scratch.

heroIntro.leadPart1: No weeks of setup. No reinventing components. No rework for Android, iOS, and Web.
heroIntro.leadPart2: The complete Flutter kit: backend, auth, payments, UI, and our CLI. You focus on the idea.

heroWorkspaceMock.phoneAlt: Kasy mobile interface, remote control for agents

featureHoverCards.heading: What slows the launch
featureHoverCards.subtitle: Setup, visual identity, and multi-platform work, handled before you open the editor.

commands.title: Our smart CLI
commands.description: Tired of burning AI tokens (and money) just to configure a project? Answer a few prompts: our multilingual CLI sets up nearly everything on its own. Also built for people who have never written a hello world.
commands.alt: Kasy CLI terminal with guided setup

branding.title: Your visual identity
branding.description: Rebrand skills ship with the project. With Cursor or Claude and your Figma file, AI applies typography, icons, colors, and spacing to the kit in minutes, not weeks.
branding.alt: Kasy design system colors and token panel

everywhere.title: iOS, Android, and Web
everywhere.description: Stop rebuilding for each platform. With Flutter, one codebase covers all three without the usual cross-platform rework. With Preview Device, you validate in the browser with real fidelity.

integrationsShowcase.heading: Everything a real app needs
integrationsShowcase.subtitle: Backend, login, subscriptions, ads, push notifications, and publishing, already wired. You don't assemble the stack. You ship.

appShowcase.heading: Your idea. In the stores.
appShowcase.subtitle: More than code: the shortest path from idea to a published app. See what's possible when you skip the setup.

testimonials.headingPart1: From people who left the idea
testimonials.subtitle: Founders and developers who got past setup and made it to publish.

items.text: The CLI set up Firebase, login, and payments before I touched a single screen. In about a week I was already on TestFlight.
items.name: Lucas Almeida

items.text: I don't code. I still got my app submitted to both stores, following the kit and asking for help when I got stuck.
items.name: Marina Costa

items.text: The browser preview saved me hours. No spinning up emulators: iOS and Android side by side in the browser.
items.name: Diego Fernández

items.text: I moved a client project to Supabase without rewriting the app. That would have taken me days elsewhere.
items.name: Priya Nair

items.text: RevenueCat, push, and analytics were already there. I built my features and submitted for review.
items.name: Tom Becker

items.text: I updated through the CLI and nothing broke on the live app. With other kits that always gave me headaches.
items.name: Sofia Rossi

items.text: Idea to TestFlight in about a week. The component gallery saved me from building the UI from scratch.
items.name: Akira Tanaka

items.text: I started with Firebase. The client asked for REST mid-project. I didn't have to start over.
items.name: Hannah Müller

items.text: The Cursor rules made the AI follow the project's patterns. Less time fixing the obvious stuff.
items.name: Rafael Santos

contact.heading: Still have a question?
contact.body: Reach out before you buy. We reply within 24 hours.

items.question: Do I need to know how to code to use Kasy?
items.answer: No. The kit is built for people who have never written a hello world and for people who already code. Either way, the goal is the same: ship without spending months on setup.

items.question: How is Kasy different from other boilerplates?
items.answer: Many deliver only a technical setup (sometimes buggy) or only UI. Kasy delivers the full path: configuration, components, visual identity, subscriptions, and publishing. We're the only ones with Preview Device: build and inspect in the browser. Our CLI also creates and updates projects with an active subscription, without breaking what you already shipped.

items.question: Can I use the kit on multiple projects?
items.answer: Yes. With an active subscription you can create and update unlimited apps. The license is commercial: publish, sell your apps, and build for clients. What you can't do is sell, share, or give away the kit. Piracy is tied to your purchase ID and can lead to legal action.

items.question: What if I already have a project in progress?
items.answer: Kasy is designed for new projects. For existing ones, you can copy components in manually.

items.question: What happens when my annual access expires?
items.answer: The app you already shipped keeps working as usual. When access expires, the CLI stops creating new projects and delivering updates. To renew, email kasy@aicrus.io. Renewal includes a US$50 increase over the plan price.

items.question: Which platforms does the app run on?
items.answer: iOS, Android, and Web, with setup and responsiveness ready. Because it's Flutter, you can enable Linux and Windows yourself, but the polished focus of the kit is those three platforms.

items.question: What is Kasy Club?
items.answer: It's the community and hands-on training around Kasy: exclusive classes, weekly live sessions, networking, and support. Ideal if you want guidance beyond the kit alone.

items.question: Can I sell the apps I build with the kit?
items.answer: Yes. On every plan the license is commercial: publish, sell your apps, or build for other people. Just don't sell or share the kit itself.

items.question: Can I get a refund?
items.answer: Kit access is digital and immediate. That's why the kit portion is non-refundable. On the Kit + Kasy Club combo, the Club has a 7-day guarantee: you can watch, join lives, and if it's not for you, request a refund for the Club difference only. Questions before buying? Email kasy@aicrus.io.

pricing.heading: Pick the plan that fits your moment
pricing.subtitle: Both plans work for people who code and for people who never have. The difference is Kasy Club: guidance, networking, and priority support.
pricing.checkoutNote: Secure checkout via Stripe. International cards accepted. Your activation key arrives by email within minutes.

regionalDiscount.message: Regional discounts so Kasy stays accessible to everyone. 🌎

success.heading: Welcome to Kasy
success.body: We sent your activation key to the email you used at checkout. Install the CLI with npm install -g kasy-cli and run kasy new when you're ready.
success.emailHint: Check your inbox and spam folder. The email may take a few minutes.

successCombo.heading: Kit + Kasy Club unlocked
successCombo.body: We sent your Kit activation key to the checkout email. Kasy Club access is also ready on that same email: sign in or create your account to start the lessons.
successCombo.emailHint: Check your inbox and spam folder. The Kit email may take a few minutes.
